items.definition_en: An irrigation system is a set of equipment used to supply water to plants.
items.example_en: The irrigation system in our garden saves us a lot of time.

items.definition_en: A watering can is a container with a spout used to water plants by hand.
items.example_en: She filled the watering can to help water the flowers.

items.definition_en: A sprinkler is a device that sprays water onto plants or grass.
items.example_en: The sprinkler covers the entire lawn with a gentle mist.

items.definition_en: A hosepipe is a flexible tube used to carry water for gardening.
items.example_en: He connected the hosepipe to the tap to reach the vegetable patch.

items.definition_en: A rain barrel is a large container used to collect rainwater.
items.example_en: We use a rain barrel to collect water for the garden.

items.definition_en: A watering schedule is a planned timetable for when to water plants.
items.example_en: I follow a strict watering schedule to keep my plants healthy.

items.definition_en: A soaker hose is a type of hose that slowly releases water along its length.
items.example_en: A soaker hose is perfect for watering the vegetable beds evenly.

items.definition_en: A watering technique is a specific way of delivering water to plants.
items.example_en: She learned a new watering technique to minimize waste.

items.definition_en: Drip irrigation is a method of supplying water directly to plant roots.
items.example_en: Drip irrigation reduces water usage in the garden.

items.definition_en: A moisture sensor is a device that measures how much water is in the soil.
items.example_en: The moisture sensor indicates when the soil is too dry.

items.definition_en: A watering timer is a device that automatically controls when watering starts and stops.
items.example_en: We set the watering timer to run every morning.

items.definition_en: A mulch layer is a covering of material on soil to keep in moisture.
items.example_en: We applied a fresh mulch layer to help retain moisture in the beds.

items.definition_en: Rainwater collection is the process of gathering and storing rainwater for use.
items.example_en: Rainwater collection helps us water the garden sustainably.

items.definition_en: A nozzle is a device for controlling the direction or flow of water.
items.example_en: The adjustable nozzle lets you change the water's spray pattern.

items.definition_en: A watering rose is a perforated cap for a watering can to give a gentle spray.
items.example_en: Attach the watering rose to sprinkle water over delicate seedlings.

items.definition_en: A garden reservoir is a large container storing water for garden use.
items.example_en: The garden reservoir provides enough water during dry spells.

items.definition_en: A drought is a long period with little or no rain.
items.example_en: Many plants struggled during the recent drought.

items.definition_en: A watering wand is a long tool attached to a hose for reaching plants.
items.example_en: I use a watering wand to water hanging baskets easily.

items.definition_en: A root zone is the area of soil around the roots of a plant.
items.example_en: Make sure the root zone gets enough moisture when you water.

items.definition_en: Water conservation is the practice of using water efficiently to reduce waste.
items.example_en: Water conservation is essential during the dry season.
